description: These chef-inspired gummies taste like they came from a secret candy kitchen: slow-set, fruit-forward, and infused evenly for a smooth edible experience. It blends CBN to help you relax and ease into rest, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and THC for a classic euphoric lift in a 2:2:1 ratio. Expect a smooth hybrid edible experience — give it time to bloom before taking more.
